weapons.name: Potato Cannon
weapons.description: Spud-loader cannon. Fast cadence, small potatoes — chips away at swarms.

weapons.name: Idaho Potato Rifle
weapons.description: Three Idaho-russet spuds in a 22° cone. Trades range for coverage — perfect for sweeping a lane.

weapons.name: Yukon Gold Mortar
weapons.description: Three Yukon Gold spuds packed into a tight 12° cone. Heavy alpha, slow cadence — heaviest reactor draw in the catalog.

weapons.name: Red Bliss Rocket
weapons.description: Slow-firing Red Bliss seeker with massive payload. Locks onto the nearest enemy and chases it down.

weapons.name: Chantenay Cluster
weapons.description: Five wide-and-short Chantenay carrots in a 28° fan. Each shot arcs down hard — short range, heavy zone-deny.

weapons.name: Imperator Lance
weapons.description: Long slender Imperator carrot fired as a lance. Flies almost straight — barely a kiss of gravity. Punishes anything that drifts into the lane.

weapons.name: Nantes Burst
weapons.description: Classic orange Nantes carrots spit at machine-gun cadence. Mild arc, steady stream — the workhorse of the carrot line.

weapons.name: Plasma Whip
weapons.description: Pinprick damage at machine-gun cadence — a near-continuous lash that melts armor over time.

weapons.name: Hailstorm
weapons.description: Five icy slugs in a wide arc. Heavy alpha strike on tight cooldown — the screen-clearer.
